tldr_zh: AI模型與政策頻出，科技巨頭佈局未來，全球政經局勢動盪。
tldr_en: AI models and policies emerge, tech giants plan for the future, while global political and economic landscapes remain volatile.

items.title_zh: OpenAI強化GPT-Rosalind，推進生命科學研究
items.title_en: OpenAI Enhances GPT-Rosalind for Life Sciences Research
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-Rosalind新功能，專為生命科學研究設計，強化生物推理、藥物化學、基因組學分析及實驗工作流程能力。此舉有望加速藥物發現與生物技術創新。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has introduced new capabilities for GPT-Rosalind, specifically designed for life sciences research. These enhancements improve biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities, aiming to accelerate drug discovery and biotech innovation.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布前沿AI治理藍圖，呼籲美國建立聯邦框架
items.title_en: OpenAI Releases Blueprint for Frontier AI Governance, Urges US Federal Framework
items.summary_zh: OpenAI提出美國前沿AI治理藍圖，建議建立聯邦框架以確保AI安全、韌性及國家安全。此舉旨在引導AI發展，使其符合社會利益並降低潛在風險。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has outlined a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework to ensure AI safety, resilience, and national security. This initiative aims to guide AI development to benefit society while mitigating potential risks.

items.title_zh: Google發布Gemma 4 12B模型，可在筆電上運行
items.title_en: Google Releases Gemma 4 12B Model, Designed for Laptops
items.summary_zh: Google推出新的Gemma 4 12B模型，專為具備16GB RAM的筆記型電腦設計。該模型採用新編碼方案和代幣預測技術，使其在輕量級設備上也能高效運行，擴大AI模型的應用範圍。
items.summary_en: Google has released its new Gemma 4 12B model, designed to run on any laptop with 16GB of RAM. Utilizing a new encoding scheme and token prediction, this model aims to perform efficiently on lighter devices, broadening the accessibility of AI models.

items.title_zh: Alphabet為Google AI業務募資850億美元，創紀錄
items.title_en: Alphabet Raises Record $85 Billion for Google's AI Business
items.summary_zh: Alphabet為Google的AI業務成功募資850億美元，創下歷史紀錄。這筆巨額資金顯示投資者對AI領域的強烈興趣與信心，預示著Google在AI發展上的巨大野心。
items.summary_en: Alphabet has successfully raised a record-breaking $85 billion for Google's AI business. This massive funding signals strong investor appetite and confidence in the AI sector, indicating Google's significant ambitions in AI development.

items.title_zh: 川普簽署AI資安行政命令，要求業者自願提供模型測試
items.title_en: Trump Signs AI Security Executive Order, Requests Voluntary Model Testing
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普簽署AI資安行政命令，要求聯邦政府建立前沿AI模型自願測試機制。此舉旨在強化AI安全，但最終版本已較白宮原先考慮的方案大幅縮減。
items.summary_en: U.S. President Trump has signed an AI security executive order, mandating the federal government to establish a voluntary testing mechanism for frontier AI models. This aims to enhance AI safety, though the final version is significantly scaled back from initial White House proposals.

items.title_zh: Google被要求在AI搜尋中提供清晰來源，英出版商可選擇退出
items.title_en: Google Ordered to Provide Clearer AI Search Links, Allow UK Publishers to Opt Out
items.summary_zh: 英國監管機構命令Google改變其AI搜尋概覽，要求提供更清晰的來源連結，並允許英國出版商選擇退出。此舉旨在解決AI生成內容的透明度問題，並保護出版商權益。
items.summary_en: Google has been ordered by UK regulators to modify its AI Overviews, requiring clearer source links and allowing UK publishers to opt out. This aims to address transparency issues with AI-generated content and protect publishers' rights.

items.title_zh: 輝達規劃N2X與N3X晶片，目標打造星際爭霸戰電腦
items.title_en: Nvidia Plans N2X and N3X Chips, Aims for Star Trek Computer
items.summary_zh: 輝達（Nvidia）執行長黃仁勳證實，公司已規劃至少兩代RTX Spark晶片，即N2X和N3X。這顯示輝達不僅著眼於當前市場，更放眼未來，目標是實現如同《星際爭霸戰》中電腦般的先進運算能力。
items.summary_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed plans for at least two additional generations of RTX Spark chips, N2X and N3X. This indicates Nvidia's long-term vision, aiming to achieve advanced computing capabilities akin to the Star Trek computer.

items.title_zh: 歐盟新法規影響，任天堂Switch 2將支援用戶更換電池
items.title_en: Nintendo Switch 2 to Feature User-Replaceable Battery Due to EU Regulation
items.summary_zh: 因應歐盟將於2027年實施的新法規，任天堂證實其新一代Switch 2主機在歐盟地區將允許用戶自行更換電池。這項改變將提升產品的維修便利性與永續性。
items.summary_en: In response to new EU regulations set to take effect in 2027, Nintendo has confirmed that its upcoming Switch 2 console will allow users to easily replace the battery in the EU. This change aims to improve product repairability and sustainability.

items.title_zh: 蘋果App Store本週起在德州實施年齡驗證
items.title_en: Apple App Store Implements Age Verification in Texas This Week
items.summary_zh: 蘋果將於本週四起在德州App Store實施年齡驗證，以遵守德州《App Store問責法案》。此舉是在聯邦上訴法院允許該法案生效後採取的，將影響德州用戶的應用程式下載體驗。
items.summary_en: Apple will introduce age verification in the App Store for users in Texas starting this Thursday, complying with the state's App Store Accountability Act. This move follows a federal appeals court allowing the law to take effect, impacting app download experiences for Texas users.

items.title_zh: SpaceX首次公開募股有望創紀錄，馬斯克或成兆萬富翁
items.title_en: SpaceX IPO Expected to Be Record-Breaking, Could Make Musk a Trillionaire
items.summary_zh: SpaceX的首次公開募股（IPO）預計將成為史上規模最大的一次，可能使伊隆·馬斯克成為全球首位兆萬富翁。這項重大金融事件反映了市場對太空科技產業的巨大潛力與信心。
items.summary_en: SpaceX's initial public offering (IPO) is anticipated to be the largest ever, potentially elevating Elon Musk to the status of the world's first trillionaire. This significant financial event underscores the immense potential and market confidence in the space technology industry.

items.title_zh: 臺灣首期碳費徵收近50億元，半導體業佔比逾四成
items.title_en: Taiwan's First Carbon Fee Collection Nears NT$5 Billion, Semiconductor Industry Accounts for Over 40%
items.summary_zh: 臺灣環境部宣布首期碳費徵收完成，總金額達49.7億元，其中半導體業繳費占比超過四成。這標誌著臺灣碳定價機制正式上路，企業減碳承諾將持續受查核。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's Ministry of Environment announced the completion of its first carbon fee collection, totaling NT$4.97 billion, with the semiconductor industry contributing over 40%. This marks the official launch of Taiwan's carbon pricing mechanism, with ongoing audits to ensure companies fulfill their emission reduction commitments.

items.title_zh: 美國眾議院通過決議，限制川普對伊朗動武權力
items.title_en: US House Approves Resolution to Halt Military Action Against Iran, Rebuking Trump
items.summary_zh: 美國眾議院通過一項戰爭權力決議，旨在阻止對伊朗採取軍事行動，此舉是對川普政府的公開反對。這項決議反映了國會對總統戰爭權力的制衡意圖。
items.summary_en: The U.S. House of Representatives has approved a war powers resolution to halt military action against Iran, a direct rebuke to the Trump administration. This resolution reflects Congress's intent to check the President's war-making authority.
